allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''public-graph.json''\)\); kinds=set\(n[''kind''] for n in d[''nodes'']\); print\(kinds\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName ''Vite Dev Server'' -Direction Inbound -LocalPort 3000 -Protocol TCP -Action Allow")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName ''Vite Dev Server'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object DisplayName, Enabled, Direction, Action")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Action Block -Enabled True | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match ''node|Node'' } | Select-Object DisplayName, Action")
